prompt: Find all gold-tier users. For each one, show their name, city, lifetime subscription value, and their single highest-value subscription (ID + amount). Which city has the most gold-tier users?
output:
```sql
WITH gold_users AS (
  SELECT id, name, city FROM users WHERE tier = 'gold'
),
user_lifetime AS (
  SELECT gu.id, gu.name, gu.city, SUM(s.amount) AS lifetime_subscription_value
  FROM gold_users gu
  JOIN subscriptions s ON s.user_id = gu.id
  GROUP BY gu.id, gu.name, gu.city
),
user_highest AS (
  SELECT s.user_id, s.id AS highest_subscription_id, s.amount AS highest_subscription_amount
  FROM subscriptions s
  JOIN gold_users gu ON gu.id = s.user_id
  WHERE s.amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM subscriptions WHERE user_id = s.user_id)
)
SELECT ul.name, ul.city, ul.lifetime_subscription_value, uh.highest_subscription_id, uh.highest_subscription_amount
FROM user_lifetime ul
JOIN user_highest uh ON uh.user_id = ul.id;
```

| Name | City | Lifetime Subscription Value | Highest Subscription ID | Highest Subscription Amount |
|---|---|---|---|---|
